title: Update inventory and VS Code extension documentation

source.subject: docs: update inventory and enhance VS Code extension documentation

body:
Updates superrepo inventory and VS Code extension docs for LSP bootstrap, Open VSX matrix, and F5 dev paths.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32)
- **Subject:** docs: update inventory and enhance VS Code extension documentation
- **Completed:** 2026-05-25

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-editor-lsp-cli`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CLI LSP launch & VS Code toolchain** (`v03-editor-lsp-cli`).
